creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You have either only partially updated ports tree or not using 
portupgrade or simular tools for updating it. 

To fix your problem do: 

portupgrade -R gnutls-* 

or: 
$ cd /usr/ports/security/libgcrypt # make deinstall install clean and 
the build gnutls
